Item 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

Net sales increased 5 percent to reflect growth in Services revenue, which reached a new all-time quarterly record, partially offset by a decline in Mac and iPad product categories.

iPhone revenue remained broadly stable year-over-year as the product cycle matured, with strength in the premium tier offsetting unit volume compression in emerging market geographies.

Gross margin expanded by approximately 60 basis points driven by a favorable mix shift toward higher-margin Services revenue and disciplined management of component and logistics costs.

We returned over 25 billion dollars to shareholders during the quarter through share repurchases and dividends, consistent with our long-standing capital return program and board authorization.

Item 3. Other Information
